question: Does the logical vocab_size=10000 padded-to-10048 tile64 route complete if allowed to run longer than the first 75 minute attempt?
prune_reason: Manual stop after the router entered a low-information hard tail. v9984/tile64 already proves the useful architectural point, and the board loop is higher priority.

comparison_to_v9984_tile64.interpretation: The padded full-10k first router iteration stays close to v9984/tile64, so the tile64 padding strategy preserves the good route family.

decision.next_gate: Use the already-routed v9984/tile64 lane as the first board-programming candidate, then return to padded v10k only if the board loop is proven and the extra 16 logical tokens matter.
